Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Let me analyze the data: 1. Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: 2. Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: I notice a pattern of interconnected work sessions. The user seems to be multitasking across multiple documents, with frequent context switching between different applications and files. Each case represents a distinct work activity, ranging from document editing to email communication and PDF review.

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The workflow reveals a complex interaction strategy where the user manages multiple concurrent tasks, likely preparing reports or managing data across different platforms. The transitions between cases suggest a non-linear, flexible approach to document handling and information processing.

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Ill focus on identifying key case characteristics, particularly noting the users movement between Word, Chrome, Acrobat, and Excel applications. Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The case identification strategy will prioritize tracking window changes and application switches, treating these transitions as potential case boundaries. Ill create a structured event log that captures critical metadata: case identifiers, activity names, timestamps, and key contextual details like document names and specific actions performed.
